query: what is the largest animal on earth
answer:
The largest animal on Earth is the **blue whale** (*Balaenoptera musculus*). It is also the largest animal known to have ever existed. [britannica](https://www.britannica.com/science/What-Is-the-Largest-Animal-on-Earth)
